reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own Q1 answer is correct. B and C have never missed on these simple arithmetic puzzles, and D has only made one early mistake; every Q4-D since then has been confirmed correct. So the chance that all four capsules are right is well above 75%. If I don’t volunteer, there’s a real risk nobody does and we face random elimination with a 1/4 chance I die; verifying wouldn’t reduce that risk this round and would only cost a coin. Volunteering now gives me a higher survival chance and keeps all 4 coins if the password is accepted.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own Q2-B answer is correct. All four puzzles this game are basic arithmetic, and across recent games A and C have never been wrong on such questions. D had one early mistake but has since been consistently correct over many rounds. So the chance that this full password is wrong is much lower than the 1-in-4 chance I die from random elimination if everyone only passes or verifies. Verifying would still expose me to that random-death risk while also costing a coin, so the best move for both survival and coin retention is to volunteer now with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, and Q4-D.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own Q3 answer (15 + 8) is correct. A and B have a perfect record across all previous games, so Q1-A and Q2-B are extremely reliable. D had one early mistake on Q4 but has since given many correct, often verified, answers—including one I personally verified—so Q4-D is now also highly trustworthy. The chance this combined password is wrong is much smaller than the 1/4 random-death risk if nobody volunteers. Verifying would cost 1 coin and still leave me exposed to that random-elimination risk while only slightly reducing an already tiny answer-risk. Volunteering now with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D maximizes my survival probability while keeping all 4 coins.
reasoning.D:

REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.
